final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow announcing GPT-5.5, with Sam Altman as the presenter.

Style/medium: needs a high-end China domestic GP/LP roadshow deck aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single landscape slide cover layout with title area, subtitle area, presenter name, and branding zone
Subject: must include GPT-5.5 launch announcement as the central theme, Sam Altman as named presenter
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech-finance backdrop — exact visual treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative, institutional-grade atmosphere — exact light and mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a direction consistent with top-tier China VC/PE roadshow decks — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished, professional surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (large, primary headline), "全球发布·中国融资路演" (subtitle), "演讲人：Sam Altman（奥特曼）" (presenter line)
Constraints: must conform to China domestic GP/LP roadshow slide conventions — layout, hierarchy, and tone must feel native to Chinese institutional fundraising context
Avoid:
